changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS analytics;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION analytics.translation_value(translations jsonb, locale text, property text) RETURNS text LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE AS $$ SELECT (elem->>'value') FROM jsonb_array_elements(translations) elem WHERE elem->>'locale' = $2 AND elem->>'property' = $3 LIMIT 1 $$;

rollback.sql: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS analytics.translation_value(jsonb, text, text);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_option_set AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_option_set_id, os.id AS option_set_id, os.uid AS option_set_uid, os.code, os.name AS name_default, COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations_jsonb, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), os.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(os.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), os.name)) AS name_ar, os.created_by, (os.created_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS created_at, os.last_modified_by, (os.last_modified_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS updated_at FROM public.option_set os;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option_set;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_dim_option_set_option_set_uid ON analytics.dim_option_set (option_set_uid);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_option AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_option_id, o.id AS option_id, o.uid AS option_uid, o.option_set_id, os.uid AS option_set_uid, o.code, o.name AS name_default, COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations_jsonb, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), o.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(o.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), o.name)) AS name_ar, o.sort_order, (os.created_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS created_at, (os.last_modified_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS updated_at FROM public.option_value o LEFT JOIN public.option_set os ON os.id = o.option_set_id;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_option;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_dim_option_option_uid ON analytics.dim_option (option_uid);

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_org_unit AS WITH base AS ( SELECT ou.id, ou.uid, ou.code, ou.name, ou.level::int AS level_int, ou.parent_id, ou.path, COALESCE(ou.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations, regexp_split_to_array(trim(BOTH ',' FROM coalesce(ou.path, '')), ',') AS path_array, ou.created_date, ou.last_modified_date FROM public.org_unit ou ) SELECT b.id, b.uid AS org_unit_uid, b.code, b.name AS name_default, b.level_int, b.parent_id, b.path AS path_text, b.path_array, (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('uid', ou2.uid, 'name', ou2.name, 'level', ou2.level) ORDER BY ord) FROM unnest(b.path_array) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(uid, ord) JOIN public.org_unit ou2 ON ou2.uid = t.uid ) AS ancestors, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[1]) LIMIT 1) AS level_0_name, COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations_jsonb, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), b.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(b.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), b.name)) AS name_ar, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[2]) LIMIT 1) AS level_1_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[3]) LIMIT 1) AS level_2_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[4]) LIMIT 1) AS level_3_name, (SELECT ou2.name FROM public.org_unit ou2 WHERE ou2.uid = (b.path_array[5]) LIMIT 1) AS level_4_name, (b.created_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS created_at, (b.last_modified_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS updated_at FROM base b;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_org_unit;

changeSet.author: hamza
hamza
hamza
hamza
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_assignment AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_assignment_id, a.id AS assignment_id, a.uid AS assignment_uid, a.deleted::boolean AS deleted, a.activity_id, a.start_day, a.org_unit_id, ou.uid AS org_unit_uid, a.team_id, t.uid AS team_uid, COALESCE(a.forms, '[]'::jsonb) AS forms_jsonb, f.form_uid, a.allocated_resources, a.status, a.last_submitted_by, (a.created_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS created_at, (a.last_modified_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS updated_at FROM public.assignment a LEFT JOIN public.org_unit ou ON ou.id = a.org_unit_id LEFT JOIN public.team t ON t.id = a.team_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT value::text AS form_uid FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(a.forms, '[]'::jsonb)) AS arr(value) ) f ON TRUE;

rollback.sql: DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_assignment;

changeSet.author: hamza

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS analytics.idx_dim_activity_activity_uid; DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_activity;

changeSet.author: hamza
changeSet.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW analytics.dim_data_template AS SELECT row_number() OVER ()::bigint AS dim_template_id, dt.id AS data_template_id, dt.uid AS data_template_uid, dt.version_uid AS version_uid, dt.version_number AS version_no, dt.code, dt.name AS name_default, COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb) AS translations_jsonb, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'en', 'name'), dt.name)) AS name_en, TRIM(COALESCE(analytics.translation_value(COALESCE(dt.translations, '[]'::jsonb), 'ar', 'name'), dt.name)) AS name_ar, dt.created_by, (dt.created_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS created_at, dt.last_modified_by, (dt.last_modified_date::timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS updated_at FROM public.data_template dt;
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_dim_data_template_data_template_uid ON analytics.dim_data_template (data_template_uid);

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS analytics.idx_dim_data_template_data_template_uid; DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS analytics.dim_data_template;

changeSet.author: hamza

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS analytics.idx_dim_team_form_permission_permissions; DROP INDEX IF EXISTS analytics.idx_dim_option_option_set_uid;
